SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.management

Packages that use org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.management
Package
Description
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
Public API of the Camunda Platform engine.

Typical usage of the API starts by the creation of a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineConfiguration
(typically based on a configuration file), from which a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
can be obtained.

Through the services obtained from such a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
, BPM and workflow operation can be executed:

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RepositoryService
: Manages
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.repository.Deployment
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
: For starting and searching
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstance
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
: Exposes operations to manage human (standalone)
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.task.Task
s, such as claiming, completing and assigning tasks
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
: Used for managing
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.User
s,
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.Group
s and the relations between them
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
: Exposes engine admin and maintenance operations, which have no relation to the runtime execution of business processes
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.HistoryService
: Exposes information about ongoing and past process instances.
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
: Access to form data and rendered forms for starting new process instances and completing tasks.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
API implementation classes, which shouldn't directly be used by end-users.

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
.

    Class
    Description
    ActivityStatisticsQuery
     
    DeploymentStatisticsQuery
     
    JobDefinitionQuery
    Allows programmatic querying of JobDefinitions.
    MetricsQuery
     
    ProcessDefinitionStatisticsQuery
     
    SchemaLogQuery
     
    SetJobRetriesBuilder
    Fluent builder to update the number of retries for one or multiple jobs synchronously.
    SetJobRetriesByJobsAsyncBuilder
    Fluent builder to update the number of retries for one or multiple jobs asynchronously.
    SetJobRetriesByProcessAsyncBuilder
    Fluent builder to update the number of retries for one or multiple jobs referenced by process asynchronously.
    TableMetaData
    Structure containing meta data (column names, column types, etc.)
    TablePageQuery
    Allows programmatic querying of TablePages.
    UpdateJobDefinitionSuspensionStateSelectBuilder
    Fluent builder to update the suspension state of job definitions.
    UpdateJobSuspensionStateSelectBuilder
    Fluent builder to update the suspension state of jobs.

    Allows programmatic querying of JobDefinitions.
